spec.description: Producción de palma por material genético (HIB/GIN/SIN). Rangos: Hoy, Semana, 15 días. Datos en toneladas.

spec.title: Híbrido (HIB) hoy
spec.description: Toneladas de material híbrido cosechadas HOY

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(ISNULL(SUM(kg_cosechados), 0) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Híbrido"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_produccion_palma
WHERE fecha = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
  AND cod_material = 'HIB';

spec.title: Guineensis (GIN) hoy
spec.description: Toneladas de material guineensis cosechadas HOY

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(ISNULL(SUM(kg_cosechados), 0) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Guineensis"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_produccion_palma
WHERE fecha = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
  AND cod_material = 'GIN';

spec.title: Sin clasificar (SIN) hoy
spec.description: Toneladas de material sin clasificar cosechadas HOY

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(ISNULL(SUM(kg_cosechados), 0) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Sin clasificar"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_produccion_palma
WHERE fecha = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
  AND cod_material = 'SIN';

spec.title: Total hoy
spec.description: Total de todas las cosechas hoy

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(ISNULL(SUM(kg_cosechados), 0) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Total hoy"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_produccion_palma
WHERE fecha = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);

spec.title: Distribución por material - Últimos 15 días
spec.description: Composición % HIB / GIN / SIN del total cosechado en los últimos 15 días

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    CASE fp.cod_material
        WHEN 'HIB' THEN 'Híbrido OxG'
        WHEN 'GIN' THEN 'Guineensis'
        ELSE 'Sin clasificar'
    END AS "Material",
    ROUND(SUM(fp.kg_cosechados) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Toneladas"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_produccion_palma fp
WHERE fp.fecha >= DATEADD(DAY, -15, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
  AND fp.cod_finca IN ($finca)
  AND fp.fuente IN ($fuente)
GROUP BY fp.cod_material
HAVING SUM(fp.kg_cosechados) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(fp.kg_cosechados) DESC;

spec.title: Resumen Semana (7 días)
spec.description: Totales por material en los últimos 7 días

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'HIB' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Híbrido",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'GIN' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Guineensis",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'SIN' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Sin clasificar",
    ROUND(SUM(fp.kg_cosechados) / 1000.0, 1) AS "TOTAL"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_produccion_palma fp
WHERE fp.fecha >= DATEADD(DAY, -7, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
  AND fp.cod_finca IN ($finca)
  AND fp.fuente IN ($fuente);

spec.title: Resumen 15 días
spec.description: Totales por material en los últimos 15 días

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'HIB' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Híbrido",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'GIN' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Guineensis",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'SIN' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Sin clasificar",
    ROUND(SUM(fp.kg_cosechados) / 1000.0, 1) AS "TOTAL"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_produccion_palma fp
WHERE fp.fecha >= DATEADD(DAY, -15, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
  AND fp.cod_finca IN ($finca)
  AND fp.fuente IN ($fuente);

spec.title: Material por finca - últimos 15 días
spec.description: Composición HIB/GIN/SIN apilada por cada finca

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    df.nombre AS "Finca",
    CASE fp.cod_material
        WHEN 'HIB' THEN 'Híbrido OxG'
        WHEN 'GIN' THEN 'Guineensis'
        ELSE 'Sin clasificar'
    END AS "Material",
    ROUND(SUM(fp.kg_cosechados) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Toneladas"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_produccion_palma fp
JOIN dw_palmeras.dbo.dim_finca df ON df.cod_finca = fp.cod_finca
WHERE fp.fecha >= DATEADD(DAY, -15, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
  AND fp.cod_finca IN ($finca)
  AND fp.fuente IN ($fuente)
GROUP BY df.nombre, fp.cod_material
HAVING SUM(fp.kg_cosechados) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(fp.kg_cosechados) DESC;

spec.title: Cuadro finca × material - últimos 15 días
spec.description: Cruce finca × material en toneladas. Alerta visual sobre lotes Sin clasificar

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    df.nombre AS "Finca",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'HIB' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Híbrido OxG",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'GIN' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Guineensis",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'SIN' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Sin clasificar",
    ROUND(SUM(fp.kg_cosechados) / 1000.0, 1) AS "TOTAL"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_produccion_palma fp
JOIN dw_palmeras.dbo.dim_finca df ON df.cod_finca = fp.cod_finca
WHERE fp.fecha >= DATEADD(DAY, -15, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
  AND fp.cod_finca IN ($finca)
  AND fp.fuente IN ($fuente)
GROUP BY df.nombre
HAVING SUM(fp.kg_cosechados) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(fp.kg_cosechados) DESC;

spec.title: Tendencia diaria por material - últimos 15 días
spec.description: Producción día a día desagregada por tipo de material

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    CAST(fp.fecha AS DATETIME) AS time,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'HIB' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Híbrido OxG",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'GIN' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Guineensis",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.cod_material = 'SIN' THEN fp.kg_cosechados ELSE 0 END) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Sin clasificar"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_produccion_palma fp
WHERE fp.fecha >= DATEADD(DAY, -15, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
  AND fp.cod_finca IN ($finca)
  AND fp.fuente IN ($fuente)
GROUP BY fp.fecha
ORDER BY fp.fecha;

spec.title: MONITOREO EN VIVO - MOVIMIENTO DEL DÍA
